checkin.journal:
Almost one month in Dubai and loving it, really best possible weather ever, sleep was weird due to high pressure , but I managed to fall asleep and sleep well more or less
Tai chi 2x Han 1 x white crane
Breakfast
Talking to Olle we had a bit of a rough start day - but we came up with idea of Bitstarz Innovation
Meeting Kris therapist from Joint Space - was interesting - I think the guy has a point its a transversal from left leg to the upper neck - we will do some therapies and then we will see
